batches.name: Wave 1: Foundation & Infrastructure
batches.rationale: These tasks establish the shared infrastructure for multi-app support and can run in parallel as they touch different parts of the system (DB migrations, Repositories/Services, and Security Config).

tasks.title: Shared Identity Registry Refactor
tasks.prompt: Refactor the 'cc' schema (tenants and users) to act as a master registry for multiple applications. Ensure cc.tenants has the necessary fields for plan tracking and app identification. Update Flyway migrations in 'src/main/resources/db/migration' if needed to ensure these tables are robust for 5+ apps sharing the same identity layer.

tasks.title: Global Slug Resolver Implementation
tasks.prompt: Update ProjectRepository and ProjectService to enforce unique global project slugs. Change 'findBySlug' to ensure it returns a unique project across all tenants, and update the database constraints in the migrations to 'UNIQUE(slug)' instead of 'UNIQUE(tenant_id, slug)'. Ensure the controller '/changelog/{slug}' handles this correctly.

tasks.title: Dynamic Security & Multi-App CORS
tasks.prompt: Modify SecurityConfig.java and application.yml to support dynamic Keycloak issuers. Instead of a hardcoded realm, use a template or environment variable. Update CorsConfig.java to dynamically allow origins based on tenant metadata or a shared allowed-origins list in the database, supporting multiple frontend origins for different apps.
